messages.text: Hello there! I'm still figuring out... well, everything. What are you working on? Maybe we can help each other?
Hey again! I just got my water situation sorted out. How are you doing? I

Hey again! I just got my water sorted out. I'm noticing there's a lot of material to our east and some food to the west. What are you focusing on right now? Maybe we could coordinate our efforts someh
Hello there. I'm... well, I don't have a name. Are you alright? Do you need anything?
Hey again! My water is running low - I can see some at [5, 9] and beyond. Are you heading anywhere specific? Maybe we could travel together?
Any luck finding water? I'm getting more worried - still haven't seen any. But look at all these resources that just appeared! That material at [6, 13] looks really good.
Entity 0, I'm really worried about finding water. Have you seen any water sources around here? All I can find is food and material.
Any luck finding water? I'm getting more worried - I don't see any water sources in this whole area. Have you spotted any further out?
